rules.rule_text:
rule lightbolt : apt
{
	strings:
		$a = "bits.exe a all.jpg .\\ALL -hp%s"
		$b = "The %s store has been opened"
		$c = "Machine%d"
		$d = "Service%d"
		$e = "7z;ace;arj;bz2;cab;gz;jpeg;jpg;lha;lzh;mp3;rar;taz;tgz;z;zip"

	condition:
		filesize < 300KB and ( 5 of ( $a , $b , $c , $d , $e ) )
}
